input_text: Hey support, my account ID 10934 is locked out. I tried resetting my password but the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page gives me a 500 error. This is urgent as I need to pay my invoice today.

expected_output.summary: Customer cannot log in and encounters a 500 error when using the password reset link.

input_text: Hello, I am Sarah Connor. The new analytics dashboard feature is missing the export to CSV button that was promised in the last release notes. Can we get an ETA on this?

expected_output.summary: The export to CSV button is missing from the new analytics dashboard.

input_text: The entire billing system is down! We keep getting charged multiple times for the Pro Plan. Ticket ref: #ERR-992. Please fix immediately, this is costing us thousands.

expected_output.summary: The billing system is malfunctioning and charging multiple times for the Pro Plan.
